views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's interactions, top contacts wheel, pending follow-ups banner, network size stat, and streak counter with quick-add FAB

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick-capture modal for logging a new interaction — person name with autocomplete from history, relationship picker, context picker, star-style connection rating, and optional follow-up field

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Searchable timeline of all interactions, grouped by person or by date, with filter chips for relationship type and meeting context

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Network growth line chart, relationship-type pie chart, meeting-context breakdown, connection quality trend, follow-up completion rate, neglected contacts list, and AI-generated insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyInteractionCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total interactions logged this calendar week (Monday through Sunday)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive calendar days with at least one interaction logged, counting back from today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalUniqueContacts
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of distinct personName values (case-insensitive) across all entries ever

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topContacts
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top 5 most frequently logged people with their total interaction count, sorted descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: pendingFollowUps
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Entries where followUp is non-empty and followUpDone is false, sorted oldest-first so urgent ones surface first

viewModelComputedProperties.name: pendingFollowUpCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of entries with pending (incomplete) follow-up actions

viewModelComputedProperties.name: networkGrowthThisMonth
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of unique personNames that appear for the first time in the current calendar month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageConnectionRating
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean connectionRating across all entries from the last 30 days, on a 1-5 scale

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrendDelta
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change in interaction count comparing current week to previous week: (thisWeek - lastWeek) / lastWeek

viewModelComputedProperties.name: interactionsByRelationshipType
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Breakdown of all-time interactions grouped by RelationshipType for pie/bar chart rendering

viewModelComputedProperties.name: interactionsByMeetingContext
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Breakdown of all-time interactions grouped by MeetingContext showing how the user connects (in-person vs call vs online)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: neglectedContacts
viewModelComputedProperties.description: People not interacted with in 30+ days, as (name, daysSinceLastInteraction) tuples sorted by most neglected first

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily interaction counts for the last 30 days for rendering a line or bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of the weekly interaction goal achieved (weeklyInteractionCount / weeklyGoal), can exceed 1.0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: recentInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of generated insight strings like 'You met 3 new people this week — up from 1 last week' or 'Reconnect with Sarah — it has been 45 days'

dailyGoal.description: Target number of interactions to log per week (weekly cadence makes more sense than daily for relationship tracking)

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if at least one interaction entry is logged on that calendar day. The streak counts consecutive active days backward from today.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary trend: weekly interaction count compared to 4-week rolling average. Secondary trends: new unique contacts per month (network growth rate), follow-up completion rate (completed / total follow-ups created per week), average connection quality rating over time (30-day rolling window). Flag weeks where interaction count drops below 50% of the 4-week average.
insights: Network growth pulse: 'You met N new people this week' compared to last week's count
Follow-up nudges: flag any pending follow-up older than 7 days with person name and days elapsed
Neglected relationships: surface people not contacted in 30+ days, prioritized by previous interaction frequency
Network diversity score: percentage split across relationship types — flag if any single category exceeds 70%
Connection quality trend: is your average connectionRating trending up or down over the last 4 weeks
Most active networking day: which day of the week you log the most interactions
Preferred connection style: most common MeetingContext — 'You connect most over coffee (42% of interactions)'
Monthly network size milestone: celebrate when totalUniqueContacts crosses 25, 50, 100, 250
